name: github_delete_org_copilot_space
description: Delete an organization Copilot Space (DELETE /orgs/{org}/copilot-spaces/{space_number}). Returns HTTP 204. See [Delete an organization Copilot Space](https://docs.github.com/en/rest/copilot-spaces/copilot-spaces?apiVersion=2026-03-10#delete-an-organization-copilot-space).
